title: Serial with order by is not working properly
poc: create table t1 (num int, age int);
create table t2 (id serial, num int, age int);
insert into t2(num, age) select num, age from t1 order by num, age;
key_bug_features: Inserting ordered data into serial table fails
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t3 (id serial, num int NOT NULL, age int CHECK (age >= 0));
INSERT INTO t3(num, age) VALUES (2, NULL);
INSERT INTO t3(num, age) SELECT num, age FROM t3 ORDER BY age DESC;
